overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a dark coat walking through a snowy courtyard toward a massive gothic cathedral entrance. The environment features snow-covered ground, stone architecture with icicles, and ornamental gargoyle statues flanking the wooden doors.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the snowy courtyard toward the cathedral entrance

notable_agents.action: distant stationary figure standing near the building facade

entered.detail: massive stone building with arched windows and icicles hanging from roof edges
ornate double doors with metal studs and arched stone frame
large decorative stone bowl with snow-covered foliage
large decorative stone bowl with snow-covered foliage
winged stone gargoyle statue flanking the entrance stairs
winged stone gargoyle statue flanking the entrance stairs

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide snowy courtyard toward a massive gothic cathedral. Large stone planters sit on either side of the path, while winged gargoyle statues guard the distant entrance. The cool blue hour lighting casts soft shadows across the snow-covered ground.

events.description: passing between the large stone planters as the entrance stairs come into view

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the entrance as the gargoyle statues grow larger in the frame

entered.detail: snow-dusted stone steps leading up to the wooden door

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the stone planters, which fall behind as the entrance stairs come into view. The gargoyle statues now dominate the sides of the frame, and the massive wooden door grows larger as the approach continues.

events.description: character begins ascending the stone stairs toward the entrance

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone steps toward the large wooden door

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with snow patches leading up to the entrance
ornate stone arch framing the wooden door

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone stairs, bringing the massive wooden door into close view. The gargoyle statues now appear at mid-distance on either side, while the ornate stone archway frames the entrance. The camera tilts slightly upward as the climb continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy courtyard that culminates in a close approach to a massive gothic cathedral entrance. It begins with the character walking across the wide, snow-covered ground under cool blue hour lighting, passing between large stone planters while winged gargoyle statues stand guard in the distance. As the character advances, the planters fall behind and the gargoyles expand to dominate the sides of the frame, making the distant wooden doors loom larger. The scene then shifts as the character ascends the stone stairs, bringing the ornate stone archway and the massive wooden door into a tight, imposing view. Finally, the camera tilts slightly upward to emphasize the scale of the entrance as the climb concludes.
